name: clean lung screening CT — Lung-RADS 1, baseline

report.indication: Baseline low-dose CT lung cancer screening, asymptomatic.
report.technique: Low-dose non-contrast CT of the chest with 1 mm reconstructions.
report.findings: Lungs: no solid, part-solid, or non-solid nodule. No consolidation. No mediastinal or hilar adenopathy. Heart size normal. No pleural effusion. Visualised upper abdomen: no acute finding.
report.impression:
1. Negative low-dose CT lung cancer screening.
2. Lung-RADS 1.
3. Continue annual screening per current guidelines.
